description_long: This doll depicts a humanoid figure dressed in a vintage-style clown costume, featuring a ruffled white collar, puffed sleeves, and a tiered skirt. The outfit is predominantly pale gray with red accents, including three prominent buttons down the front and red details on the shoes. The doll's head is topped with bright orange hair styled in a distinctive, swept-back fashion, while the face is left blank and featureless, adding an eerie quality. The hands are sculpted with exaggerated, elongated fingers, and the figure stands on a round, dark base. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a classic horror character, with a theatrical and unsettling presence. The materials and paintwork suggest a solid, molded construction typical of collectible figurines.
description: A pale gray clown doll with orange swept-back hair, red accents, and a ruffled collar, standing on a dark round base. The face is blank, and the figure has exaggerated hands and theatrical clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ruffled collar, three red buttons, blank face, and both hands extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the orange hair, puffed sleeve, and the layered skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the costume, the full shape of the hair, and the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm's position, the side of the skirt, and the shoe details.
attribute_clothing_style: Victorian-inspired clown costume with a ruffled white collar, puffed sleeves, tiered skirt, and red button accents, all in pale gray and white with theatrical, horror-themed influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and extended outward, hands open with fingers splayed, legs straight and feet together on a round base, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Blank face with no visible features, conveying a neutral and expressionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, bright orange hair styled in a swept-back, voluminous manner with a prominent peak at the crown.
